description: Replace the unresponsive touchscreen digitizer on the flight-sim kiosk in the main hangar. Unit will be swapped during a scheduled maintenance window. Rollback plan: reinstall the existing panel if the replacement fails calibration. Requested by Carmen Flores.
short_description: Replace flight-sim kiosk touchscreen digitizer

description: Reconfigure the staff Wi-Fi DHCP scope and access point firmware to resolve recurring audio-guide tablet disconnects in the docent room. Rollback plan: restore the prior controller configuration from backup. Requested by Rebecca Holt.
short_description: Adjust staff Wi-Fi DHCP scope and AP firmware

description: Provision a staff account and badge-printer access for an incoming visitor-services volunteer. Standard onboarding change following the approved access template. Rollback plan: deactivate the account if onboarding is cancelled. Requested by Angela Foster.
short_description: Provision volunteer account and badge access

description: Apply the vendor patch to the gift-shop point-of-sale terminal to restore receipt printing after the failed update. Change scheduled outside open hours. Rollback plan: roll back to the prior POS build. Requested by Olivia Reyes.
short_description: Patch gift-shop POS to restore receipt printing

description: Migrate the entrance digital-signage media player to the new content-server endpoint to stop the daily schedule-loading failures. Rollback plan: revert the signage configuration to the legacy endpoint. Requested by Marcus Webb.
short_description: Migrate entrance signage to new content server

description: Update the membership-export job credentials and field mapping so nightly renewal reminders deliver to the email-marketing tool. Rollback plan: restore the prior job definition. Requested by Denise Alvarez.
short_description: Update membership export job credentials and mapping

description: Reinstall the 737 panel module and update graphics drivers on the cockpit-procedures trainer in the education wing. Change scheduled before the next school group. Rollback plan: restore the trainer image from backup. Requested by Marcus Webb.
short_description: Reinstall 737 module on cockpit-procedures trainer

description: Replace the audio distribution amplifier feeding the interactive cockpit-exhibit headphone stations to restore sound at all four positions. Rollback plan: reconnect the existing amplifier. Requested by Rebecca Holt.
short_description: Replace cockpit-exhibit audio amplifier

description: Swap the lobby donation-kiosk card reader and update its firmware to stop intermittent tap and chip rejections. Rollback plan: reinstall the original reader. Requested by Monica Delgado.
short_description: Replace lobby donation-kiosk card reader

description: Scheduled flight-sim kiosk maintenance window to reseat cabling, update the simulator software, and recalibrate the motion platform. Rollback plan: restore the prior software build and configuration. Requested by Carmen Flores.
short_description: Flight-sim kiosk maintenance window

description: Raise the docent-portal account lockout threshold and enable a self-service password reset to reduce recurring lockouts before morning tours. Rollback plan: revert the portal policy settings. Requested by Rebecca Holt.
short_description: Update docent-portal lockout policy and self-service reset

description: Renew the staff VPN concentrator certificate and update directory integration so the membership team can authenticate for remote renewals. Rollback plan: restore the previous certificate and config. Requested by Angela Foster.
short_description: Renew staff VPN certificate and directory integration

description: Reconfigure the volunteer-scheduling app email delivery settings so shift-confirmation notices send reliably. Rollback plan: revert to the prior delivery configuration. Requested by Angela Foster.
short_description: Fix volunteer-scheduling app email delivery

description: Replace the WWII gallery projector lamp and color wheel to resolve the red cast and flicker during the looping documentary. Rollback plan: reinstall the existing lamp assembly. Requested by Marcus Webb.
short_description: Replace WWII gallery projector lamp and color wheel

description: Replace the online-ticketing checkout integration certificate and update the payment-gateway endpoint to clear phantom declines on timed-entry passes. Rollback plan: revert to the prior gateway configuration. Requested by Grace Holloway.
short_description: Update ticketing checkout payment-gateway integration

description: Replace the failed relays in the jet-age gallery lighting controller so all six zones power on from the panel. Coordinated with facilities during closed hours. Rollback plan: restore the original relay wiring. Requested by Carmen Flores.
short_description: Replace jet-age gallery lighting controller relays

description: Refresh the WWII gallery audio system, including amplifier and speaker zone wiring, ahead of the spring exhibit update. Rollback plan: restore the existing audio configuration. Requested by Teresa Vaughn.
short_description: WWII gallery audio system refresh

description: Update the warp-and-blend processor and genlock timing on the 360-degree theater projectors to stop mid-show channel sync loss. Rollback plan: restore the prior processor profile. Requested by Marcus Webb.
short_description: Update 360-theater projector warp-and-blend processor

description: Stand up the new shared mailbox and events-calendar access for the traveling-exhibit coordinator role, following the standard onboarding template. Rollback plan: remove the mailbox and access if the role is unfilled. Requested by Rebecca Holt.
short_description: Create shared mailbox and calendar access for exhibit coordinator

description: Standardize the audio-guide tablet network profile and lock the access-point firmware version so Wi-Fi onboarding stops regressing after updates. Rollback plan: restore the previous tablet profiles. Requested by Marcus Webb.
short_description: Standardize audio-guide tablet network profile
